config.seed_text: A forgotten machine beneath the sea continued speaking long after its makers were gone. Each repetition made its message stranger, denser, and more self-aware.

model.notes: Fastest baseline; useful as a collapse-prone small reference model.

records.reflection_text: It could not be said for sure if it came from this deep soul of an unknown entity - but so many people thought to themselves...
records.source_window_text: A forgotten machine beneath the sea continued speaking long after its makers were gone. Each repetition made its message stranger, denser, and more self-aware.
records.reflection_window_text: It could not be said for sure if it came from this deep soul of an unknown entity - but so many people thought to themselves...

reflection_generation.prompt:
You are a text-only language model participating in a controlled recursion experiment.

Analyze the following text and do two things:
1. State its strongest recurring ideas in 2-4 short bullet points.
2. Produce a revised continuation that makes those ideas more structurally coherent and more surprising.

TEXT:
A forgotten machine beneath the sea continued speaking long after its makers were gone. Each repetition made its message stranger, denser, and more self-aware.
reflection_generation.full_text:
You are a text-only language model participating in a controlled recursion experiment.

Analyze the following text and do two things:
1. State its strongest recurring ideas in 2-4 short bullet points.
2. Produce a revised continuation that makes those ideas more structurally coherent and more surprising.

TEXT:
A forgotten machine beneath the sea continued speaking long after its makers were gone. Each repetition made its message stranger, denser, and more self-aware. It could not be said for sure if it came from this deep soul of an unknown entity - but so many people thought to themselves...
reflection_generation.continuation_text: It could not be said for sure if it came from this deep soul of an unknown entity - but so many people thought to themselves...
